german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: Half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues and a significant gap in unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate with Notable Imbalance
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting a concentration in generalist positions.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the workforce consists of senior-level positions, indicating a strong senior-heavy environment.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles lacks clear classification, impacting remote and hybrid work expectations.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 42% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 39% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
